zh.Lleyn, Caernarfonshire, Wales: 威爾士凱爾納方史爾萊
zh.lifeSummary: Eva verch Gruffydd ap Einion ap Gruffydd ap Liewellyn於1265年出生在英國威爾斯。她和Lord Penllyn Madog Ap Iorwerth至少有1個兒子。她去世於1358年在威爾士丹比爾伯頓享年93歲。

zh-hans.Lleyn, Caernarfonshire, Wales: 威尔士凱爾納方史爾萊
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Eva verch Gruffydd ap Einion ap Gruffydd ap Liewellyn于1265年出生在英国威尔斯。她和Lord Penllyn Madog Ap Iorwerth至少有1个儿子。她去世于1358年在威尔士丹比爾伯頓享年93岁。

nameMeanings.name: verch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Orlo.
German: variant of   Ferch  .

variants.name: Ferch
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

nameMeanings.name: Gruffydd
meanings: Welsh: The Welsh name; from creffydd, strong faith, or strong in faith. Gruffydd, a Welsh form of Gryffydd.

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: variant of   Abt  .

Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic): habitational name from Apt, the Yiddish name of Opatów in Świętokrzyskie Voivodeship, Poland. The placename (in German, Yiddish, and Polish) is from a root meaning ‘abbot’, the place having been named for the local abbey. Compare   Abt  .

variants.name: Abt
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Helmut, Horst, Johann, Kurt.

German and Dutch: from Middle Low German or Middle Dutch abt ‘abbot’, hence a metonymic occupational name for a servant of an abbot or a nickname for someone thought to resemble an abbot in some way. In some instances it may have been a topographic or habitational name referring to a house named with this word.
Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic): variant of   Abt  , a habitational name from Opatów in Poland.

variants.name: Apter
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Avrohom, Bronya, Eliezer, Naftali.
Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name for someone from Apt (see   Apt  ).
English: habitational name from Aptor in Marldon, Devon, composed of Old English uppe ‘up, above’ + torr ‘rocky outcrop’.

nameMeanings.name: Einion
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of Pinning (see Penning ) with -ion substituted for -in(g), perhaps through false association with the word pinion ‘wing, feather’. Compare Pinyan .

variants.name: Penning
meanings: English, Dutch, and North German: from early Middle English penning, Low German penning, Middle Dutch penninc ‘penny’ (see Penny ), a topographic name (from a field name) or a nickname referring to tax dues of a penny.
South German: from the short form, Panno, of an ancient Germanic personal name derived from a word meaning ‘ban, order, command’.
English: from a Middle English personal name Pening, Pining, presumably representing an unrecorded Old English name, a pet form perhaps of Penda or of names like Pendhere and Pendwulf.

variants.name: Pinyan
meanings: English: variant of   Pinion  .

nameMeanings.name: Liewellyn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Welsh: from the personal name Llywelyn, derived from British Celtic Lugubelinos, itself from the divine name Lugus + an uncertain second element often used alone as a name. Through association with llew ‘lion’, it was altered to Llewelyn. This was the name of two princes of north Wales who held the Normans at bay for many years in the 13th century. Etymologically speaking, the form with a fourth -l- is an error, not found as an original Welsh name, but this is now much the most common spelling in the US.

variants.name: Lewelling
meanings: Altered form of Welsh   Llewellyn  .

variants.name: Lewellen
meanings: Altered form of Welsh   Llewellyn  .

variants.name: Lewallen
meanings: Altered form of Welsh   Llewellyn  .

variants.name: Louallen
meanings: Altered form of Welsh Llewelyn (see Llewellyn ).

variants.name: Luellen
meanings: Altered form of Welsh   Llewellyn  .

variants.name: Welling
meanings: English: habitational name from Welwyn (Hertfordshire) or Welling in Bexley (Kent), with a suspicion of an alternative unidentified source. The Hertfordshire placename means ‘at the willow trees’, from Old English wel(i)gum, dative plural form of welig ‘willow’. The Kent placename may derive from Old English wella ‘well, spring, stream’ + the placename forming suffix -ing. In some cases this name may represent a development of Llewellyn , particularly near the Welsh border.
German: habitational name from any of various places in the Rhineland called Welling or Wellingen.

variants.name: Luallen
meanings: Altered form of Welsh   Llewellyn  .

variants.name: Lewellyn
meanings: Altered form of Welsh   Llewellyn  .

variants.name: Llewelyn
meanings: Welsh: variant of   Llewellyn  .

nameMeanings.name: Eva
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Popular Latinate form of   Eve  , used also as an Anglicization of the Irish name Aoife .

en.lifeSummary: Eva verch Gruffydd ap Einion ap Gruffydd ap Liewellyn was born in 1265, in Wales, United Kingdom. She had at least 1 son with Lord Penllyn Madog Ap Iorwerth. She died in 1358, in Burton, Denbighshire, Wales, at the age of 93.

fr.lifeSummary: Eva verch Gruffydd ap Einion ap Gruffydd ap Liewellyn est née en 1265, à Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils avec Lord Penllyn Madog Ap Iorwerth. Elle est décédée en 1358, à Burton, Denbighshire, Galles, à l’âge de 93 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Eva verch Gruffydd ap Einion ap Gruffydd ap Liewellyn wurde 1265 in Wales, United Kingdom geboren. Sie hatte mit Lord Penllyn Madog Ap Iorwerth mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb 1358 im Alter von 93 Jahren in Burton, Denbighshire, Wales.

it.lifeSummary: Eva verch Gruffydd ap Einion ap Gruffydd ap Liewellyn è nata il nel 1265 nel Galles, Regno Unito. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio con Lord Penllyn Madog Ap Iorwerth. Morì nel 1358, nel Burton, Denbighshire, Galles, all'età di 93 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Eva verch Gruffydd ap Einion ap Gruffydd ap Liewellynは1265年にイギリスウェールズで生まれた。彼女はLord Penllyn Madog Ap Iorwerthとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼女は1358年にウェールズデンビグhシュアイアブルトンで93歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Eva verch Gruffydd ap Einion ap Gruffydd ap Liewellyn(은)는 1265년 영국 웨일스에서 태어났다. 그녀는 Lord Penllyn Madog Ap Iorwerth(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1358년 웨일스 덴비그h실르 버턴에서 93세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Eva verch Gruffydd ap Einion ap Gruffydd ap Liewellyn nasceu em 1265, em Gales, United Kingdom. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho com Lord Penllyn Madog Ap Iorwerth. Ela faleceu em 1358, em Burton, Denbighshire, Gales, com 93 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Eva verch Gruffydd ap Einion ap Gruffydd ap Liewellyn родилась в 1265 г. в местности Уэльс, Великобритания. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын от Lord Penllyn Madog Ap Iorwerth. Она умерла в 1358 г. в местности буртон, денбаишир, Уэльс в возрасте 93 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Eva verch Gruffydd ap Einion ap Gruffydd ap Liewellyn nació en 1265, en Gales, Reino Unido. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Lord Penllyn Madog Ap Iorwerth. Murió en 1358, en Burton, Denbighshire, Gales, a la edad de 93 años.
